title: Zambia National Public Health Institute (Amendment) Act, 2024

sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Zambia National Public Health Short title
sections.text:
This Act may be cited as the Zambia National Public Health Short title
Institute (Amendment) Act, 2024, and shall be read as one with
the Zambia National Public Health Institute Act, 2020, in this Act Act No. 19 of
2020
referred to as the principal Act.

sections.heading: Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the insertion of Amendment
sections.text:
Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the insertion of Amendment
the following new definition in the appropriate place: of section 2
“National Health Research and Training Institute” means
the National Health Research and Training Institute
Act No. of
established under the National Research and Training Institute 2024
Act, 2024;.

sections.heading: Section 4 of the principal Act is amended by the—
sections.text:
Section 4 of the principal Act is amended by the—
Amendment
of section 4
(a) insertion of the figure “(1)” immediately after the figure
“4”;
(b) deletion of paragraph (p) and the substitution therefor of
the following:
(p) conduct research, to ensure public health security
and global health security;; and
(c) insertion of the following new subsection immediately
after subsection (1):
(2) The research referred to under subsection (1)
(p) shall be conducted in accordance with the
National Health Research Act, 2013. Act No. 2 of
2013
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 4.00 each.
228
